name: Byron Lyons

contactInfo.office: 602 E. Church St., Suite 105, Livingston, TX 77351

bio: Byron Lyons serves as the Polk County Sheriff, overseeing law enforcement and public safety for Polk County from the county seat of Livingston. Sheriff Lyons manages patrol operations, investigations, and the county jail while serving the Lake Livingston area community.
campaignPromises: Expand lake patrol on Lake Livingston for public safety
Improve emergency response times across the large county
Combat property crimes targeting seasonal and vacation homes
Enhance cooperation with the Alabama-Coushatta Tribal Police
Invest in deputy training and professional development
